meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
domains: Special Campaign for Disposal of Pendency Matters
meta.project_subject: Work Order for extension of SCDPM PMU (01.10.2024 to 31.03.2025)
meta.deliverables: Monitoring progress on Special campaign/SCDPM Portal; Data Analytics of received data; Drafting Agenda for Monthly Review Meetings of all Ministries/Departments; Preparation of Presentations/reports on Ministries/Departments update and progress; Analysis of Best practices on Monthly basis; Preparation of Assessment Report of Special campaign 4.0; Preparation of monthly report of Secretariat Reforms based on monthly data on SCDPM Portal; Any other work assigned by DARPG

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) has approved Quality Council of India's proposal for extension of the SCDPM PMU from 01.10.2024 to 31.03.2025 on nomination basis. The scope includes monitoring progress on Special campaign/SCDPM Portal, data analytics, drafting meeting agendas, preparing presentations/reports, analyzing best practices, preparing assessment reports, and other assigned work. The PMU team will comprise 3 QCI professionals working for 6 months, with at least one having core expertise in data analytics from Tier 1 College. Total cost is Rs. 30,24,000/- plus GST, with monthly invoicing based on actual attendance. Services may be discontinued if unsatisfactory.
